GOVERNMENT
decisions are made on Iocal level. Large-scale decisions in direct democracy can be cumbersome_ may take time t0 poll the populace and determine consensus: Direct democra cies can be volatile and vulnerable to outside manipulation.
The status of   the Federated   Commonwealtn'$ head   of state known as the Archon Prince Princess_ currently dispute. Officially: the Archon Prince outranks the First Prince_ who serves as regent on New Avalon , and the Archon; who serves as regent on Tharkad Protocol dictates that ay head of state be treated as the peer Of prince though only the Capellan rank of Chancellor and the Combinc rank of Coordinator are direct equivalents The Captain-General the Free Worlds League and the Elected Prince Rasalhague are   temporary positions but  Ine; are accorded equivalence 0i rank as courtesy: prince princess IS generally addressed as your high ness nighness;
DISORDER Though rare in the Inner Sphere Save perhaps war zones complete breakdown of social structure authority comt monplace on many of the less civilized Periphery worlds Given lack defined government or civil cooperation, control often disputed between two Or more individuals Or groups. Bandits and pirates thrive these areas of chaos and lawlessness Titles AND NOBILITY keeping with their feudal origins every nation in the Inner Sphere includes some type ot noble ciass, Many noble titles are common several nations having originated on Terra the millennia before humankind journeyed t0 the stars Terran nobility originated with the feudal system Of govern: ment most prevalent the Middle Ages_ when sovereign del: egated responsibility for various areas select subjects exchange for personal oath fealty. These subordinate lead: ers were grantea patent of nobility allowing them use title commensurate with their importance The nobility had virtually died out when Michael Cameron_ the first elected ruler of the Terran Hegemony recognized the system $ practica application as means exerting control over humankind $ expanding   sphere of  influence The ever widening expanse of colonies had clearly grown beyond the capacity of single ruler Or even single dynasty to control directly; as for direct democracy; the expense ad difficulty space travel and the limits communications   technology across the vast reaches of colonized space made that system government equally impractical. Over the centuries especial: since the fall of the first Star League_ the concept of noble ruling class has taken hold throughout the Inner Sphere Unlike its historica predecessor; Cameron's system of nobility does not discriminate by gender. Nobility in the thirty-first century largely hereditary; though most sovereigns can grant titles their subjects this practice relatively rare even among MechWarriors those modern day knights. The most common noble titles and their regional equiva lents are described below.
DUKEIDUCHESS Aside from sovereigns and their heirs dukes and duchess es are the pinnacle  of the nobility, governing  territories behalf their state relers_ These holdings_ Known duchies, range from single important worla t0 collection of border worlds The most powerful dukes frequently called grand dukes great dukes arcndukes outrank esser dukes and almost always rule dozens worlds The Arc-Royal Defense Cordon the Lyran Alliance and tne Duchy of Oriente tne Free Worlds League are the best known of the current grand ducnies Even these prominent territories; however, pale in com- parison with the vast marches of the Federated Suns each of which contains more than hundred worlds most Successor   States, duke has ncar-absolute authority   Overhis holdings with considerable   independence trom his llege lord. To the subjects in given duchy; the duke or duchess; rather than the nation'$ sovereign, frequently repre- sents Ine   most visible and immediate authority. Given this degree of power and freedom_ duchies often become the focus independence movements example. the perennially secessionist Duchy Andurien in the   Free Worlds League Some duchies are independent states wnose rulers have retained the rank of duke tor political reasons Dukes of the Draconis Combine by contrast, largely Iack such independence general, they control only the civilian aspects of government. while  military   authority and real porer remains the nands of the warlords Most duchies hereditary though the sovereign of Iedim Mdv influence their distribution; Some duchies are actu ally neld by the crown For example tne Lyran Duchy of Tharkad reserved for the Archon; while the Capellan Chancellor is also the Duke of Sian; duke Or duchess addressed as your grace.
PRINCE/PRINCESS Unlike most other noble titles_ the title of  prince is not awarded Dy sovereign; but instead applies t0 absolute or near- adsolute rulers or their neirs apparent in nereditary monarchy: Among the rulers of the Successor States, only the head 0i the Federated Suns known as prince Imore accurately: First Prince_ though several Periphery lordlings have adopted similar titles an attempt t0 legitimize their rule_ The title of Prince Princess Imperial denotes the   neir the    Federated Suns throne_ though officially that title IS only awarded after the heir has served five years in the military-
